cc-watch Double-Dash Normalizer

Live demo of the fix in scripts/cc-release-watch.mjs + scripts/cc-triage.mjs. Strips repeated - bullet prefixes that broke LLM-side JSON parsing on CC 2.1.126. Regex: /^(- )+/gm → -

Try a preset

Input → Normalized


  


  
Stats

  


  

    Branch: fix/cc-watch-double-dash-normalize ·
    Issue: parse_failed sentinel for CC 2.1.126 ·
    Phase A of the cc-watch self-heal plan ·
    Companion flag: cc-triage.mjs --retry-failed /
    RETRY_FAILED=1 for one-shot recovery of stuck entries.
